chapters.title: Wake Up
chapters.content: Anna wakes up every day at six thirty. She opens the window, stretches, and listens to the birds outside.

chapters.title: Breakfast Time
chapters.content: She prepares coffee, toast, and fruit for breakfast. Sometimes she reads a book while eating.

chapters.title: Leaving Home
chapters.content: Before leaving for work, Anna checks her bag, waters her plants, and says goodbye to her cat.
